scene_summary: A rain-dark museum arcade with illuminated music and directory signage, a central etched glass forest facade, a brass-and-emerald floor inlay, a listening bench, record vitrine, ceramic basin, and low guqin tea platform visible as interaction surfaces.
usable_surfaces: freestanding NTS Don't Assume directory pylon
large Habitual Line Stepper brass floor inlay

detected_objects.label: Computer-life Thank You For Your Hard Work Lightbox
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Large glowing framed poster on the left wall with readable 'computer-life' title, 'Thank You For Your Hard Work' subtitle, city image, and track list.

detected_objects.label: NTS Don't Assume Directory Pylon
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Freestanding black information pylon with visible NTS logo, 'DON'T ASSUME' heading, numbered directory entries, and nts.live text.

detected_objects.label: Blessings of the Forest Glass Facade
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Tall curved central glass wall with etched forest silhouettes, green reflections, vertical panel seams, and misty illuminated woodland imagery.

detected_objects.label: Habitual Line Stepper Floor Inlay
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Dominant walkable floor surface with swirling brass contour lines, emerald enamel sections, and readable central 'Habitual Line Stepper' medallion.

detected_objects.label: My Tracks Listening Bench
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Curved bench or low wall on the right with visible 'My Tracks' text, tally marks, and headphones placed on top.

detected_objects.label: Fabric Presents Record Vitrine
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Tall glass display case on the right labeled 'fabric PRESENTS' and 'Discogs', containing a visible record sleeve and disc.

detected_objects.label: I Want An Earth Basin
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Large shallow ceramic bowl in the lower left filled with dark water and small green island-like forms.

detected_objects.label: Shu Qin Tea Threshold
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Low foreground platform holding a long stringed guqin instrument, teapot, cups, tray, and visible steam.

detected_objects.label: Handwritten Shu Qin Book
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Closed dark book or placard at bottom right with gold handwritten characters on its cover, adjacent to the tea setup.

detected_objects.label: Habitual Line Stepper Floor Inlay
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Planned source artifact from the scene brief.
